subcodes.first_line: O my God! O my God! Thou seest me in utter lowliness and contrition, communing with Thee in the hidden depths of my heart and the inmost mysteries of my spirit, and saying: O Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی بکل ذل و انکسار اناجیک فی خفیات قلبی و سراثر روحی و اقول رب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @suffering and imprisonment, @Hands of the Cause, @prayer for governments and rulers, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @unity; oneness of humanity
